reviews.comment:
En líneas generales todos los puestos del ACA siempre están bien cuidados, el personal siempre atento. Y están en muchos lugares de caminos donde no hay nada.

(Translated by Google)
Generally speaking, all the ACA stations are always well-maintained, and the staff are always attentive. And they're located in many places along roads where there's nothing else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzdGFUXzlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
muy buena atención! !falta que te limpien los vidrios del auto. ..A veces ni preguntan ...Otras te los limpian de uno!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! They just need to clean your car windows... Sometimes they don't even ask... Other times they clean them for you!
